description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build smartmontools on Cygwin that can be triggered manually. In a single windows-latest job, install Cygwin and build tools, configure git, check out the repository with a deep fetch history and tags, then build Cygwin x86_64 binaries for smartmontools using autogen.sh, configure, make, and check. Finally, upload the resulting artifact with a 30-day retention.
